fundamentals.summary: Curated subset (~50) of W3C CSS Color Module Level 4 named colors with hex values.
fundamentals.license_note: W3C CSS named colors are public-domain — names + hex values are spec-defined.

fundamentals.summary: Semantic UI palette (success/warning/error/info/neutral) with light/base/dark tiers per role. Tailwind-500-derived defaults.
fundamentals.license_note: Tailwind CSS is MIT-licensed; hex values are spec defaults, not branding marks.

_notes: Second fundamental category implementing MCHATAI_FUNDAMENTALS.md spec §8 (color-palettes). Shipped 2026-05-12 in Slice D. Surfaces v1: native_swift + wisdom_resource. Future surfaces deferred until consumers ask: mcp_tool read_color_palette, prompt_token {{COLOR_PALETTE:id}}, runtime_global window.mchatai.colorPalette, skill_namespace 'color' (e.g. builtin.color.nearest).
